creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, Jan 30, 2009 at 10:30 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/hs-utf8-string-ghc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/131134 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131134

Please commit the port. I'm approving it.

Thanks for the submission.
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA
